title: AEKO
description: AI Engine Optimization for ecommerce — monitor how ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity recommend your products, audit domains for AI-readiness (llms.txt, robots.txt, JSON-LD), track audience prompts, generate AEO-optimized content, and execute AEKO action items.
